title: Restructure platform-spec: mods, fibers, terminal/console

source.subject: docs(platform-spec): restructure compiler mods, fibers, and terminal/console

body:
## Outcome

Restructure compiler mods, fibers, and terminal/console.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.
- Concurrency surfaces align platform-spec execution chapters with compiler runtime modules.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ac8b574`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ac8b574) — docs(platform-spec): restructure compiler mods, fibers, and terminal/console
